title: Purplified Pack
description: This pack mostly makes diamond tools and gear purple and purple hearts with a few extra stuff
body:
# **This pack mostly makes diamond tools and gear purple and purple hearts with a few extra stuff like:**
- _Outlined powder snow_
- _no pumpkin blur_
- _purple totem eyes_
- _purple trident_
- _most diamond tools and gear purple (i didnt know how to do the nautlis armor and horse armor model so there still diamond)_
- _disclaimer this is my first ever texture pack and im kinda new_
